Namespace:          elasticsearch

Selector:           app=elasticsearch
Labels:             app=elasticsearch
Annotations:        <none>
Replicas:           3 desired | 3 total
Update Strategy:    RollingUpdate
  Partition:        0
Pods Status:        3 Running / 0 Waiting / 0 Succeeded / 0 Failed
Pod Template:
  Labels:       app=elasticsearch
  Annotations:  kubectl.kubernetes.io/restartedAt: 2026-07-03T16:50:50-05:00
  Init Containers:
   fix-perms:
    Image:      busybox:1.36
    Port:       <none>
    Host Port:  <none>
    Command:
      sh
      -c
      chown -R 1000:1000 /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
    Environment:  <none>
    Mounts:
      /usr/share/elasticsearch/data from data (rw)
  Containers:
   elasticsearch:
    Image:       docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.1
    Ports:       9200/TCP, 9300/TCP
    Host Ports:  0/TCP, 0/TCP
    Limits:
      cpu:     1
      memory:  1536Mi
    Requests:
      cpu:      250m
      memory:   1Gi
    Readiness:  exec [sh -c CODE=$(curl -sk -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 5 \
  --cacert /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt \
  https://localhost:9200/)
echo $CODE | grep -qE "^(200|401|403)"
] delay=20s timeout=10s period=5s #success=1 #failure=12
    Environment:
      ELASTIC_PASSWORD:  <set to the key 'password' in secret 'elastic-password'>  Optional: false
      ES_JAVA_OPTS:      -Xms512m -Xmx512m
    Mounts:
      /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs from certs (ro)
      /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elasticsearch.yml from config (rw,path="elasticsearch.yml")
      /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/roles.yml from file-realm (ro,path="roles.yml")
      /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/users from file-realm (ro,path="users")
      /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/users_roles from file-realm (ro,path="users_roles")
      /usr/share/elasticsearch/data from data (rw)
  Volumes:
   config:
    Type:      ConfigMap (a volume populated by a ConfigMap)
    Name:      es-config
    Optional:  false
   certs:
    Type:        Secret (a volume populated by a Secret)
    SecretName:  es-http-tls
    Optional:    false

content.thinking: There's already an ingress resource for elasticsearch at `elasticsearch-https`. Let me check its details and see what's already configured.

content.text: There's already an ingress resource. Let me inspect it in detail.

input.command: kubectl get ingress elasticsearch-https -n elasticsearch -o yaml 2>&1
input.description: Get the existing elasticsearch ingress yaml

content.content:
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"networking.k8s.io/v1","kind":"Ingress","metadata":{"annotations":{"nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/backend-protocol":"HTTPS","nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/force-ssl-redirect":"true","nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-ssl-verify":"off","nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/ssl-redirect":"true"},"name":"elasticsearch-https","namespace":"elasticsearch"},"spec":{"ingressClassName":"nginx","rules":[{"host":"es.example.com","http":{"paths":[{"backend":{"service":{"name":"es-http","port":{"number":9200}}},"path":"/","pathType":"Prefix"}]}}],"tls":[{"hosts":["es.example.com"],"secretName":"es-ingress-tls"}]}}
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/backend-protocol: HTTPS
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/force-ssl-redirect: "true"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/proxy-ssl-verify: "off"
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/ssl-redirect: "true"
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-03T21:24:06Z"
  generation: 1
  name: elasticsearch-https
  namespace: elasticsearch
  resourceVersion: "1115192"
  uid: 3a78a35e-550f-481c-8c8b-f18d4628a242
spec:
  ingressClassName: nginx
  rules:
  - host: es.example.com
    http:
      paths:
      - backend:
          service:
            name: es-http
            port:
              number: 9200
        path: /
        pathType: Prefix
  tls:
  - hosts:
    - es.example.com
    secretName: es-ingress-tls
status:
  loadBalancer:
    ingress:
    - hostname: localhost
